sentences.target: La disparition des clés nous rend fous.
sentences.reading: /la dispaʁisjɔ̃ de kle nu ʁɑ̃ fu/

translations.fr: La disparition des clés nous rend fous.
translations.ipa: /la dispaʁisjɔ̃ de kle nu ʁɑ̃ fu/
translations.en: The disappearance of the keys drives us crazy.
translations.es: La desaparición de las llaves nos vuelve locos.
translations.de: Das Verschwinden der Schlüssel macht uns verrückt.
translations.it: La scomparsa delle chiavi ci fa impazzire.
translations.ko: 열쇠가 사라지는 게 우릴 미치게 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 钥匙的消失让我们抓狂。
translations.ru: Исчезновение ключей сводит нас с ума.
translations.pt: O desaparecimento das chaves nos deixa loucos.
translations.vi: Sự biến mất của chìa khóa làm chúng tôi phát điên.
translations.nl: Het verdwijnen van de sleutels maakt ons gek.
translations.uk: Зникнення ключів зводить нас з розуму.
translations.hu: A kulcsok eltűnése az őrületbe kerget minket.
translations.hi: चाबियों का गायब होना हमें पागल कर देता है.
translations.pl: Zniknięcie kluczy doprowadza nas do szału.
translations.el: Η εξαφάνιση των κλειδιών μας τρελαίνει.
translations.nb: Det at nøklene forsvinner gjør oss sprø.
translations.sv: Att nycklarna försvinner gör oss galna.
translations.ro: Dispariția cheilor ne scoate din minți.
translations.cs: Zmizení klíčů nás dohání k šílenství.
translations.ja: 鍵がなくなると私たちは狂いそうになる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; agrees with feminine singular noun 'disparition' and determiners the subject NP.
Common noun; head of the subject, meaning an event of vanishing.
Contraction of the preposition 'de' and article 'les'; introduces the genitive complement 'clés' to 'disparition'.
Plural common noun; complement to 'disparition' introduced by 'des'.
Clitic personal pronoun; direct object of 'rend'.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg; takes object 'nous' and predicate complement 'fous'.
Predicate adjective; agrees in number with 'nous' as the object of 'rendre'.

sentences.target: On parle de la disparition des abeilles.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁl də la dispaʁisjɔ̃ dez abɛj/

translations.fr: On parle de la disparition des abeilles.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁl də la dispaʁisjɔ̃ dez abɛj/
translations.en: We're talking about the disappearance of bees.
translations.es: Estamos hablando de la desaparición de las abejas.
translations.de: Wir sprechen über das Verschwinden der Bienen.
translations.it: Stiamo parlando della scomparsa delle api.
translations.ko: 우리는 벌들의 사라짐에 대해 이야기하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在谈论蜜蜂的消失。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度討論蜜蜂嘅消失。
translations.pt: Estamos falando sobre o desaparecimento das abelhas.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang nói về sự biến mất của ong.
translations.nl: We praten over het verdwijnen van de bijen.
translations.hi: हम मधुमक्खियों के गायब होने के बारे में बात कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Μιλάμε για την εξαφάνιση των μελισσών.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om att bina försvinner.
translations.ja: 私たちはミツバチの減少について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun often meaning 'we'.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg; intransitive here with prepositional complement.
Preposition required by 'parler' to introduce the topic.
Definite article; determines 'disparition' within the PP.
Common noun; head of the NP governed by 'de'.
Contraction 'de + les'; introduces the nominal complement 'abeilles' to 'disparition'.
Plural common noun; complement to 'disparition' within the genitive PP.

sentences.target: Sa disparition m'a vraiment inquiété hier.

translations.fr: Sa disparition m'a vraiment inquiété hier.
translations.en: Their going missing really worried me yesterday.
translations.es: Su desaparición me preocupó mucho ayer.
translations.de: Ihr Verschwinden hat mich gestern wirklich beunruhigt.
translations.it: La sua scomparsa mi ha davvero preoccupato ieri.
translations.ko: 어제 그가 사라진 게 정말 걱정됐어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 它昨天的失踪真的让我担心。
translations.yue: 佢尋日失蹤真係令我擔心。
translations.ru: Его исчезновение вчера действительно встревожило меня.
translations.pt: O desaparecimento dele ontem realmente me preocupou.
translations.tr: Dün onun kaybolması beni gerçekten endişelendirdi.
translations.vi: Việc nó mất tích hôm qua thật sự làm tôi lo lắng.
translations.nl: Zijn verdwijning gisteren maakte me echt ongerust.
translations.uk: Його зникнення вчора мене справді занепокоїло.
translations.hi: कल उसके गायब होने ने मुझे सचमुच चिंतित कर दिया.
translations.pl: Jego zniknięcie wczoraj naprawdę mnie zaniepokoiło.
translations.el: Η εξαφάνισή του με ανησύχησε πραγματικά χθες.
translations.nb: Hans forsvinning i går bekymret meg virkelig.
translations.id: Hilangnya dia kemarin benar-benar membuat saya cemas.
translations.sv: Hans försvinnande i går gjorde mig verkligen orolig.
translations.ro: Dispariția lui de ieri m-a îngrijorat cu adevărat.
translations.cs: Jeho zmizení mě včera opravdu znepokojilo.
translations.da: Hans forsvinding i går bekymrede mig virkelig.
translations.fi: Hänen katoamisensa eilen huolestutti minua todella.
translations.ja: 昨日の彼の失踪は本当に私を心配させた。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (3rd person); agrees with feminine noun 'disparition' (not with possessor).
Common noun; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary 'a' (avoir, 3sg) with attached clitic object pronoun 'me'; forms passé composé with the participle.
Adverb of degree; intensifies the verb phrase.
Past participle; main lexical verb in a compound tense with 'avoir'.
Temporal adverb; situates the event in time.

sentences.target: Vous notez la disparition d'un dossier.

translations.fr: Vous notez la disparition d'un dossier.
translations.en: You note the disappearance of a file.
translations.es: Usted anota la desaparición de un expediente.
translations.de: Sie vermerken das Verschwinden einer Akte.
translations.it: Annota la scomparsa di un fascicolo.
translations.ko: 당신은 서류 하나가 사라진 것을 적어 둔다.
translations.zh-Hans: 你记录一个档案的丢失。
translations.yue: 你記低有一個文件夾唔見咗。
translations.pt: Você registra o desaparecimento de uma pasta.
translations.tr: Bir dosyanın ortadan kaybolduğunu not ediyorsunuz.
translations.vi: Bạn ghi nhận việc một hồ sơ biến mất.
translations.nl: U noteert het verdwijnen van een map.
translations.hi: आप एक फ़ाइल के गायब होने को नोट करते हैं.
translations.nb: Dere noterer at en mappe har forsvunnet.
translations.sv: Ni noterar att en mapp har försvunnit.
translations.da: I noterer, at en mappe er forsvundet.
translations.ja: あなたはファイルの紛失を記録する。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject, 2nd person plural/formal singular.
Main verb, present indicative 2pl; takes a direct object.
Definite article; determines the direct-object noun 'disparition'.
Common noun; head of the direct object.
Contraction of 'de' + 'un'; introduces the genitive complement 'dossier' to 'disparition'.
Common noun; complement of 'disparition' within the PP.
